Outrage is a flywheel fueled by this dynamic:
Platforms get more traffic and thus more dollars.
People get more divided and thus more dopamine.

Now take any narrative and overlay this sequence:
A controversial news story breaks. (incentivized by dollars)
Support and resistance is vocalized. (incentivized by dopamine)

Simplifying the incentives:
For platforms (more traffic = more dollars)
For people (more division = more dopamine)
Measure influence not by listeners, but by actors.
